name: Mama Lan's Vietnamese Stir-Fried Crabs
recipeIngredient: 12 large Male blue crabs, cleaned, halved with top reserved
2 cups All-purpose flour, seasoned with salt and pepper
3 Stalks lemongrass, tops and bulbs finely chopped
3 Pieces fresh ginger peeled and julienned
4 or 5 Fresh serrano chiles, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge the crabs in the seasoned flour.
2. In a large skillet, heat oil to a depth of 1/2 inch over high heat.
3. Add the top shells and fry until crispy on both sides. Remove to paper towels to drain and discard the cooking oil. Return the pan to medium heat.
4. Add butter and olive oil; when the butter melts, add lemongrass, garlic, and pepper flakes and sauté for about 30 seconds.
5. Add the crab halves and sprinkle with salt and sugar. Stir well.
6. Add ginger, green onions, and serrano chiles. Cook, stirring often for 3 to 4 minutes.
7. Place the crab tops, hollow side up, on a platter. Tuck the crab pieces into the shells.
8. Pour all of the pan juices over the stuffed shells.
9. Serve immediately with steamed jasmine rice and plenty of napkins for messy hands.
Serves 4.
